summary: The footage captures a vehicle traveling down a city street lined with trees and buildings. The vehicle maintains a steady pace while passing parked cars and trucks along the roadside.

events_timeline.event: A white sedan is seen parked on the left side of the road.

uncertainties: The identity of the pedestrians is unclear.
